design_philosophy.visual_style: Clean Light Theme with High Contrast Red Accents
core_principles: Clarity over Decoration: Data must be readable at a glance.
Density with Breathing Room: High information density (Mode B Grid) but with distinct separation.
Trust through Consistency: Uniform spacing, consistent red accents for actions.
Swiss Grid Alignment: Strong vertical and horizontal alignment.

primary.name: Mortgage Red
primary.usage: Primary CTA buttons, active states, critical alerts, logo accents

secondary.name: Obsidian Black
secondary.usage: Headings, heavy structural elements, sidebar background (optional)

headings.name: Plus Jakarta Sans
headings.usage: Page titles, card headers, dashboard metrics

body.name: Inter
body.usage: General text, data tables, inputs, labels

buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

kanban.card: bg-white p-3 rounded shadow-sm border border-slate-200 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:shadow-md transition-all

login_background.usage: Login page background with white/90 overlay

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px, default color slate-500

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use solid colors or very subtle mesh gradients only if requested.
Ensure all text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background.
All interactive elements must have a :hover and :focus state.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) for testing.
For the Kanban board, ensure drag-and-drop feeling is smooth (use @hello-pangea/dnd or similar if implementing from scratch, but stick to Shadcn pattern if available).
Charts should use 'Recharts' via the Shadcn Chart component.
Date pickers must use the Shadcn Calendar component.
Navigation should be a sidebar on desktop and a drawer on mobile.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a Mortgage CRM. Strict adherence to the 'Fintech Professional' look is required. Do not make it look like a playful startup. It should look like a bank's internal tool but modernized. Use the Red (#DC2626) sparingly for impact - do not flood the UI with red. Use Slate greys for structure.
